wall_gate.reason: The bounded controller behavior and graph remain intact on fresh validator reads, but the v2 checkpoint is stale under the frame ten-minute contract, contradicts the already accepted DKR-2 status, and the separately authored behavior challenge could not execute under the sandbox.
